experience.title: Lead Software Engineer
experience.description: Fullstack engineer that worked on Java distributed web applications and ETL data pipelines on an agile team for Program Names.

projects.description: Became a data engineer for the first time and got to create data pipelines in Apache Spark to unify multi sourced datasets for client media measurement.

Planned and lead a small team of data engineers to migrate hundreds of millions of records for our clients from a legacy platform into a new and modern one. This including having to transform legacy data and using ElasticSearch to fit the new model. Clients included the big 4 networks ABC, CBS, NBC and FOX!
Developed and maintained process/algorithm that joined Gracenote site crawled data with client inputted data using Apache Solr.
Lead an offshore team of four on new projects for Local broadcasting.
Worked with the business to identify solutions and write out requirements / filled out the User Stories for the team.
Learned AWS ecosystem and consistently worked on S3, IAM, EC2, Step Functions and CloudWatch.

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.description: Backend/systems engineer that worked on Java distributed web applications on Pivotal Cloud Foundry and supporting legacy BAU applications on prem Windows Server on an agile team for Workers' Compensation.

projects.description: Designed, developed and maintained entity REST API web services using Spring.
Promoted and integrated enterprise entity API adoption into new WC Spring backend services.
Designed and developed near real time data sync applications between distributed database and Stratus files using Spring, Kafka and Attunity.
Designed, developed and maintained configurable Identity Provider and Service Provider Single Sign On using SAML 2.0 for client needs.
Designed, developed and maintained cross application APIs between distributed Java and Stratus COBOL environments using Spring Integration(TCP) and IBM RAD J2C plugin.
Designed and developed lift and shift of 30+ microservices during company aquisition and replatforming.
Documented and hosted design and architecture sessions on aforementioned technologies to team.
Maintained a legacy WebSphere Java 4 web application.

experience.title: Software Engineer I/II
experience.description: Fullstack engineer that worked on distributed Spring applications using Java 7/8 with SQL Server 2012 on an agile team for Workers' Compensation.

projects.description: Part of the team that created a new process to load and adjudicate Physician Dispensed scripts due to client demand. This project lead to contract renewal and expanded business that would then become our 2nd largest client!
Enhanced and supported state reporting in file generation (837 EDI and NCPDP formats) and submission. Included NCCI and states of FL, TX and CA.

Designed, developed, and supported eligibility which processed 835 EDI files with bill information through a rules and pricing engine before adjudication via web service. Created scheduled jobs to check adjudication status for post processing and create 997/824 files to send back to vendor.
Enhanced and maintained internal/external portal web application and files processing engine.
Analyzed and introduced caching to the apps.
Improved internal CI/CD pipelines by adding additional quality gates.
Improved unit test coverage to >60%.
On-call support and participated in deployments regularly.
Documented technical and business processes.

experience.title: Application Developer
experience.description: Fullstack software engineer that worked on internal distributed applications for ACH payment processing.

projects.description: Designed, developed, and maintained Java web applications using Spring to process transactions from batch files.
Supported .NET applications for automated file moving/processing and self service server management.
Automated the deployment process by working with enterprise to establish CI/CD pipelines and onboarded all of the teams distributed applications.

degree.name: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science

volunteering.title: Mentor
volunteering.description: Volunteered at evening meetups to teach kids in grade school how to code or get into coding.
